expectations.text: Document does NOT contain improvement suggestions or critiques

expectations.text: Multiple agents were used during research (evidence of parallel spawning in transcript or output)
expectations.evidence: The output document itself does not contain evidence of multiple agents being spawned during the research process. There is no transcript or log showing parallel agent spawning. The document describes agent spawning as an architectural feature but does not demonstrate it was used in producing this research.
